name: Spaghetti with Garlic and Oil
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Thin spaghetti (cooked according to directions)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in olive oil over low heat.
2. Add garlic and sauté for 5 minutes on low heat.
3. Add white wine and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Toss with cooked spaghetti, garnish with parsley.
5. Serve hot with grated cheese on the side. Serve with crusty bread and salad.
